features.title: Database Foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: Questions can be stored and retrieved from persistent storage.

features.title: Question Logging APIs
features.user_visible_behavior: User can create and view logged DSA questions.
features.notes: Stores LeetCode ID, title and user approach.

features.title: Practice Engine
features.user_visible_behavior: User can start practice sessions using previously logged questions.
verification: Verify practice session returns random questions.
features.notes: Practice sessions select due questions first, otherwise random, and record practice history.

features.title: Question Rephrasing
features.user_visible_behavior: Questions are rewritten before being shown during practice.
evidence: Ollama qwen2.5:3b is the default AI provider
features.notes: Uses Ollama with qwen2.5:3b and a heuristic fallback when the local server is unavailable.

features.title: Recall Evaluation
features.user_visible_behavior: User receives feedback on how accurately they remembered a solution.
verification: Submit stored approach and recall attempt.
features.notes: Core learning feedback mechanism. Ollama-backed evaluation is available when enabled.

features.title: Pattern Extraction
features.user_visible_behavior: System automatically identifies DSA patterns from logged approaches.
features.notes: Examples include Sliding Window, BFS, DFS, DP, Two Pointers.

features.title: Review Scheduling
features.user_visible_behavior: Questions receive future review dates based on recall performance.
verification: Assign next review date after practice.
Verify due dates are generated correctly.

features.title: Due Question Prioritization
features.user_visible_behavior: Questions due for review are prioritized during practice.
verification: Verify random selection is used only when no due questions exist.
